name: Chuuk State (Micronesia)

colors.symbolism: the coconut tree and the ring of stars

description: A blue field with a central white coconut tree encircled by a ring of white five-pointed stars, one for each of Chuuk's municipalities.
history: Chuuk (formerly Truk) is the most populous state of the Federated States of Micronesia. Its current flag - a white coconut tree within a ring of stars on blue - was adopted in 1997, replacing the state's earlier 1979 design.

features.role: ring of stars encircling the tree, one per municipality
